title: torularia aculeolata
intro: Torularia aculeolata, also known as the prickly globe-mallow or globe mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae). It is native to the western United States and is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, due to the presence of mucilages and other bioactive compounds. Torularia aculeolata can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
